subcodes.first_line: O my dear daughter! Thy letter hath arrived. From the contents thereof, it hath become known that Rabindranath Tagore will quickly travel from India to America
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز نامه ات رسید از مضمون معلوم گردید که رابین دراناث تا گور از هندوستان
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @universal peace; world unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @compassion; kindness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
